title: hibbertia fractiflexa subsp. filicaulis
intro: Hibbertia fractiflexa subsp. filicaulis, also known as Diamantina Guinea Flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dilleniaceae. The medicinal properties of Hibbertia fractiflexa subsp. filicaulis lie in its high antioxidant content, anti-inflammatory properties, and antimicrobial activity. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting against bacterial and fungal infections, and potentially alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
